description: LobeHub is an AI agent collaboration platform where users create and work with persistent agent teammates, shared context, and multi-agent workflows. It also provides a marketplace for agents, MCP servers, and skills, with primary user-facing app flows hosted on app.lobehub.com.
summary: LobeHub exposes a public OpenAPI-described HTTP discovery API, an unauthenticated streamable HTTP MCP endpoint at `/api/mcp`, and an official npm CLI (`lh`); OAuth 2.0 metadata is published for Cloud API access.
